title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
